ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biological entity */,
  "taxonomic_path" TEXT /* Full taxonomic path of the entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., cell, tissue, organ) */,
  "parent_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_parent_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic group */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic group */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxonomic group */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent taxon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the taxon was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxa_parent_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level */,
  "confidence_name" TEXT /* Name of the confidence level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the confidence level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidences" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the evidence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evidence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "reference_title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to the reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each biological entity
Full taxonomic path of the entity
Type of the entity (e.g., cell, tissue, organ)
Timestamp when the entity was created
Unique identifier for each taxonomic group
Timestamp when the taxon was created
Unique identifier for each confidence level
Timestamp when the confidence level was created
Timestamp when the evidence was created
Timestamp when the reference was created
